title: 812  高階防沖擊護目鏡 (笠係泳鏡外面OR氣密鏡內)比普通鏡勁4倍以上  唔好再僥倖心理用廢鏡

replies.msg:
https://forms.gle/XsqWzszYjBZkhzFc6
前線氣密護目鏡表現調查

https://forms.gle/9eN9YdpTwgxTGhAv8
頭盔調查表現調查

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeecLLdSFThCi1ZFsg7fmTlg_gPcqv0QGxqJVj6fpt7ZyyOVw/viewform?usp=sf_link
前線經驗問卷

https://lihkg.com/thread/1442158/page/1
第一次前線經驗分享 心態 裝備 戰術 保命

全防圖詳解&購買連結 轉分頁 強烈建議睇 用pc開
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1X_p56W1VLpfWTqdVb3-C8wlLMzfcy8qH6h8w41VTyu4/edit?usp=sharing

今日再一次推介高階防沖擊護目鏡 保護眼晴好緊要

1.

Pyramex I-Force
普通版 不是氣密鏡 入面加大泳鏡
MIL-PRF 32432規格 防沖擊標準 撞擊力比其他護目鏡z87+高4倍以上
(加埋防穿透其實比高4倍更多)
岩唔洗戴眼鏡既人
有mirror (鏡面)版可以選

SLIM版細D比較貼面型 但可能罩唔住大泳鏡

普通版購買連結 (仲有貨) :
https://www.amazon.com/Pyramex-I-Force-Strap-Temples-Anti-Fog-SB7030SDT/dp/B00TJS2FH0


SLIM版:
https://www.amazon.com/dp/B00TJSZZZ4?aaxitk=y2WY8Mk6v9Luozzr7v1WsQ&pd_rd_i=B0001YXG6U&pf_rd_p=9420597b-7dad-4cbd-a28d-7d676ac67378&hsa_cr_id=9412920960001&sb-ci-n=asinImage&sb-ci-v=https%3A%2F%2Fimages-na.ssl-images-amazon.com%2Fimages%2FI%2F81AesyA7ZxL.jpg&sb-ci-a=B0001YXG6U&th=1



2.

Pyramex capstone

非氣密鏡 大個D 可以罩住泳鏡 同埋HKTVMALL有賣
一樣係MIL-PRF 32432規格

HKTVMALL:
https://www.hktvmall.com/hktv/zh/main/%E5%BE%B7%E6%B3%B0%E6%9C%89%E9%99%90%E5%85%AC%E5%8F%B8/s/H6663001/%E9%9B%BB%E5%AD%90%E9%9B%BB%E5%99%A8/%E9%9B%BB%E5%AD%90%E9%9B%BB%E5%99%A8/%E6%B1%BD%E8%BB%8A%E7%94%A8%E5%93%81/%E5%85%B6%E4%BB%96/%E7%BE%8E%E5%9C%8B%E4%BF%9D%E7%BE%8E%E8%A6%96-CAPSTONE-%E7%81%B0%E6%A1%86%E9%80%8F%E9%8F%A1%E9%98%B2%E9%9C%A7%E5%AE%89%E5%85%A8%E7%9C%BC%E9%8F%A1/p/H6663001_S_PYGG504T



AMAZON: (平D但要等)
https://www.amazon.com/Pyramex-Capstone-Direct-Indirect-Anti-Fog/dp/B001AEI3NG/ref=sr_1_3?keywords=Pyramex+capstone&qid=1565510999&s=gateway&sr=8-3



懶人包:
1. 泳鏡氣密100% 唔係4眼就一定要買
2. 4眼仔就買OTG 護目鏡 (spreadsheet入面既 no. 5 7 9 10 13 14 15 )
3. 然後戴多副高階防沖擊鏡 係裡面OR外面
4. 大部份護目鏡要連埋豬嘴戴先會貼面 唔係下面好大條那
5. 戴鏡果時要戴高/戴低d 就返自已面型 條頭帶就戴高d壓低鼻樑位
6. 豬嘴 後排單豬都係必需
7. 建議物資組新增日本城海棉條, 電線膠布俾人改裝

1. 護目鏡改裝教學


高密度海棉條 (都係日本城買)痴落唔貼面既位 (例如鼻樑)
(旁邊留一條gap俾眼鏡柄過)
(實測唔係完防 但可接受)


2. 新型滅火煎蛋工具 " 樽鹽"


樽鹽 + 蛋 搖幾下就完成
如果發現開始要搖好多下就要換鹽


3. 氣密護目鏡數據更新:
https://lihkg.com/thread/1442187/page/1

Civilian eyewear that meets a Military Specified impacts (MilSpec) generally meet MIL-PRF-31013 (glasses) or MIL-DTL-43511D (goggles).

For the US military, ballistic eyewear worn for duty must meet the MIL-PRF-32432 Military Combat Eye Protection Standard (MCEPS).


軍用規格: MIL-PRF-32432
民用 : MIL-DTL-43511D

頭盔戴好D PLZ 仲見到有人冇綁條帶 跳一跳都甩
你食彈就係咁先

呢個capstone 500型號有綠色(GC504TN)同黑(GC504T/GC504TM)

盡量唔好買綠色 (綠色無D3: provides protection from droplets and splashes)

GC504TM比GC504塊lens應該清d, 但無貨

非四眼： 泳鏡+pyramex
4眼： 眼鏡+pyramex slim（如戴到）+otg鏡

The publication of MIL-PRF-32432 consolidated two preceding standards: MIL-PRF-31013 (specifications for glasses) and MIL-DTL-43511D (specifications for goggles, visors, and faceshields). With regards to ballistic impact resistance, there was no change of specification during the consolidation of standards

姐係MIL-PRF-32432 >=MIL-DTL-43511D/MIL-PRF-31013

replies.msg:
呢隻即係表入面32號

佢規格MIL-DTL-43511D
都係under MIL-PRF-32432
(擋大約500~600ft/s既粒體)

然後佢呢把testing既散彈槍
初速係1200ft/s 15呎以外射應該唔會降太多

因為好似冇再高標準 所以d鏡實際上可能效果更好
